tagline: Proven and sustainable technology for water treatment.

hero.headline: Cleaner Water, Fewer Chemicals — Naturally
hero.subheadline: Our patented Sphagnum Moss technology keeps your pool, spa, or commercial facility crystal clear while cutting chemical usage dramatically. 23 years of proven science so you can enjoy healthier water without the hassle.

services.label: Our Solutions
services.headline: Natural Water Treatment for<br class="hidden md:block"> Every Application
services.subtitle: From backyard pools to industrial cooling towers, our patented Sphagnum Moss technology replaces harsh chemicals with nature's own water purifier.

cards.title: Residential Pool Treatment
cards.description: PoolStart Kits with patented PoolMoss technology for pools of all sizes. Monthly cartridge changes reduce chemical usage while keeping water crystal clear and swim-ready.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Treatment
cards.description: SpaStart Kits with SpaMoss cartridges keep pH and alkalinity stable for months. Minimize chemical needs and enjoy hassle-free, naturally balanced spa water.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Solutions
cards.description: PoolMoss Pro for waterparks, universities, and YMCAs. Proven at Six Flags Hurricane Harbor — lower maintenance costs and superior water quality for high-traffic facilities.

cards.title: Industrial Water Treatment
cards.description: ProMoss technology for cooling towers, manufacturing processes, and closed-loop systems. Eliminates most chemical treatments and reduces water consumption significantly.

cards.title: Pond & Fountain Care
cards.description: PoolMoss-based solutions for commercial and residential ponds and fountains. Maintain water clarity naturally without chemical treatments in decorative water features.

cards.title: Commercial Spa Treatment
cards.description: SpaMoss for hotel and wellness facility spas. Enhanced water quality, reduced chemical dependency, and lower ongoing maintenance costs for commercial operations.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Naturally Clean Water

steps.title: Choose Your Solution
steps.description: Tell us about your pool, spa, or commercial facility. We'll recommend the right PoolMoss, SpaMoss, or ProMoss product for your specific needs — no guesswork involved.

steps.title: Install in Minutes
steps.description: Our moss cartridges drop right into your existing filtration system. No plumbing changes, no special tools. Just place the cartridge and let nature go to work.

steps.title: Enjoy Cleaner Water
steps.description: Within days you'll notice softer, clearer water with far less chemical odor. Simply swap cartridges monthly and spend more time enjoying your water, not maintaining it.

about.label: Why Facilities Trust CWS
about.headline: 23 Years Proving Nature Does It Better
about.description: Founded in 2003 in Plymouth, Minnesota, Creative Water Solutions pioneered the use of patented Sphagnum Moss technology for water treatment. From Six Flags waterparks to Fortune 500 manufacturing plants, our science-backed approach consistently outperforms traditional chemical-only methods — delivering cleaner water, lower costs, and a healthier environment.

features.title: Patented Green Technology
features.description: Our Sphagnum Moss technology is the only NSF-certified natural water treatment of its kind. Renewable, sustainable, and proven effective.

features.title: Trusted by Major Brands
features.description: Six Flags, Corning, universities, and YMCA centers rely on CWS products daily. Our results speak through the companies that trust us.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: See measurable results in chemical reduction and water clarity within the first month, or we will work with you until you do. That is our commitment.

pricing.headline: Simple Pricing. Powerful Results.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the solution that fits your facility. Residential, commercial, or industrial — every product ships with everything you need to get started.

guarantee.headline: Our "Clean Water" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you do not see a measurable reduction in chemical usage and an improvement in water clarity within 30 days of using our products, contact us and we will make it right. Our 23 years of research stand behind every cartridge we ship.

faqs.question: How does Sphagnum Moss actually clean water?
faqs.answer: Sphagnum Moss naturally inhibits bacteria and biofilm growth while helping your existing sanitizer work more efficiently. It stabilizes pH, reduces disinfection byproducts, and keeps water clearer with far less chemical intervention. Our products are NSF-certified and backed by over two decades of research.

faqs.question: Will this work with my existing pool equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes. PoolMoss and SpaMoss cartridges are designed to work with any existing filtration system — salt, chlorine, bromine, or UV. No plumbing modifications needed. Simply place the cartridge in your skimmer basket or filter housing and you are all set.

faqs.question: How often do I need to replace the moss cartridge?
faqs.answer: For residential pools and spas, we recommend monthly cartridge changes. Commercial and industrial facilities may have different schedules based on water volume and usage. Each kit comes with clear instructions and a replacement schedule.

faqs.question: Is this safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our products are NSF International certified under NSF/ANSI Standard 50, the same rigorous standard applied to all commercial pool equipment. Sphagnum Moss is 100% natural and renewable, making your water safer for everyone.

faqs.question: Do you offer solutions for commercial facilities?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our PoolMoss Pro and ProMoss lines serve waterparks, university pools, YMCAs, hotels, and industrial cooling systems. We have proven results at facilities like Six Flags Hurricane Harbor and Corning manufacturing. Contact us for a custom commercial assessment.

testimonials.name: Long-Time Spa User
testimonials.text: I have been a SpaMoss user for 10 years. The water is incredibly clear, and maintenance is a breeze. I only need a tablespoon of bromine per use with no other chemicals needed. pH and alkalinity remain stable for months.

testimonials.name: Six Flags America
testimonials.text: PoolMoss Pro delivered improved water quality and reduced maintenance across our waterpark facilities. The results were consistent and measurable — exactly what a high-traffic operation needs.

testimonials.name: Corning Inc.
testimonials.text: We conducted a three-month test of ProMoss in one of our kiln cooling towers. We eliminated the use of most chemicals and reduced water consumption significantly, while maintaining or exceeding our water quality goals.
